Rewriter Init

extern int __VERIFIER_nondet_int();
/* Generated by CIL v. 1.3.6 */
/* print_CIL_Input is true */

void error(void) 
{ 

  {
  ERROR: __VERIFIER_error();
  return;
}

void master(void) 
{ 

  {
  {if (m_pc == 0) {
    goto M_ENTRY;
  } else {
    {if (m_pc == 1) {
      goto M_WAIT;
    } else {

    }}
  }}
  M_ENTRY: ;
  {
  while (1) {
    while_0_continue: /* CIL Label */ ;
    {
    E_1 = 1;
    immediate_notify();
    E_1 = 2;
    }
    {
    while (1) {
      while_1_continue: /* CIL Label */ ;
      m_pc = 1;
      m_st = 2;

      goto return_label;
      M_WAIT: ;
    }
    while_1_break: /* CIL Label */ ;
    }
  }
  while_0_break: /* CIL Label */ ;
  }

  return_label: /* CIL Label */ 
  return;
}
}

}

void init_threads(void) 
{ 

  {
  {if (m_i == 1) {
    m_st = 0;
  } else {
    m_st = 2;
  }}
  {if (t1_i == 1) {
    t1_st = 0;
  } else {
    t1_st = 2;
  }}
  {if (t2_i == 1) {
    t2_st = 0;
  } else {
    t2_st = 2;
  }}
  {if (t3_i == 1) {
    t3_st = 0;
  } else {
    t3_st = 2;
  }}
  {if (t4_i == 1) {
    t4_st = 0;
  } else {
    t4_st = 2;
  }}
  {if (t5_i == 1) {
    t5_st = 0;
  } else {
    t5_st = 2;
  }}
  {if (t6_i == 1) {
    t6_st = 0;
  } else {
    t6_st = 2;
  }}
  {if (t7_i == 1) {
    t7_st = 0;
  } else {
    t7_st = 2;
  }}
  {if (t8_i == 1) {
    t8_st = 0;
  } else {
    t8_st = 2;
  }}
  {if (t9_i == 1) {
    t9_st = 0;
  } else {
    t9_st = 2;
  }}
  {if (t10_i == 1) {
    t10_st = 0;
  } else {
    t10_st = 2;
  }}
  {if (t11_i == 1) {
    t11_st = 0;
  } else {
    t11_st = 2;
  }}

  return;
}
}
int exists_runnable_thread(void) 
{ int __retres1 ;

  {
  {if (m_st == 0) {
    __retres1 = 1;
    goto return_label;
  } else {
    {if (t1_st == 0) {
      __retres1 = 1;
      goto return_label;
    } else {
      {if (t2_st == 0) {
        __retres1 = 1;
        goto return_label;
      } else {
        {if (t3_st == 0) {
          __retres1 = 1;
          goto return_label;
        } else {
          {if (t4_st == 0) {
            __retres1 = 1;
            goto return_label;
          } else {
            {if (t5_st == 0) {
              __retres1 = 1;
              goto return_label;
            } else {
              {if (t6_st == 0) {
                __retres1 = 1;
                goto return_label;
              } else {
                {if (t7_st == 0) {
                  __retres1 = 1;
                  goto return_label;
                } else {
                  {if (t8_st == 0) {
                    __retres1 = 1;
                    goto return_label;
                  } else {
                    {if (t9_st == 0) {
                      __retres1 = 1;
                      goto return_label;
                    } else {
                      {if (t10_st == 0) {
                        __retres1 = 1;
                        goto return_label;
                      } else {
                        {if (t11_st == 0) {
                          __retres1 = 1;
                          goto return_label;
                        } else {

                        }}
                      }}
                    }}
                  }}
                }}
              }}
            }}
          }}
        }}
      }}
    }}
  }}
  __retres1 = 0;
  return_label: /* CIL Label */ 
  return (__retres1);
}
}
void eval(void) 
{
  int tmp ;

  {
  {
  while (1) {
    while_13_continue: /* CIL Label */ ;
    {
    tmp = exists_runnable_thread();
    }
    {if (tmp) {

    } else {
      goto while_13_break;
    }}
    {if (m_st == 0) {
      int tmp_ndt_1;
      tmp_ndt_1 = __VERIFIER_nondet_int();
      {if (tmp_ndt_1) {
        {
        m_st = 1;
        master();
        }
      } else {

      }}
    } else {

    }}
    {if (t1_st == 0) {
      int tmp_ndt_2;
      tmp_ndt_2 = __VERIFIER_nondet_int();
      {if (tmp_ndt_2) {
        {
        t1_st = 1;
        transmit1();
        }
      } else {

      }}
    } else {

    }}
    {if (t2_st == 0) {
      int tmp_ndt_3;
      tmp_ndt_3 = __VERIFIER_nondet_int();
      {if (tmp_ndt_3) {
        {
        t2_st = 1;
        transmit2();
        }
      } else {

      }}
    } else {

    }}
    {if (t3_st == 0) {
      int tmp_ndt_4;
      tmp_ndt_4 = __VERIFIER_nondet_int();
      {if (tmp_ndt_4) {
        {
        t3_st = 1;
        transmit3();
        }
      } else {

      }}
    } else {

    }}
    {if (t4_st == 0) {
      int tmp_ndt_5;
      tmp_ndt_5 = __VERIFIER_nondet_int();
      {if (tmp_ndt_5) {
        {
        t4_st = 1;
        transmit4();
        }
      } else {

      }}
    } else {

    }}
    {if (t5_st == 0) {
      int tmp_ndt_6;
      tmp_ndt_6 = __VERIFIER_nondet_int();
      {if (tmp_ndt_6) {
        {
        t5_st = 1;
        transmit5();
        }
      } else {

      }}
    } else {

    }}
    {if (t6_st == 0) {
      int tmp_ndt_7;
      tmp_ndt_7 = __VERIFIER_nondet_int();
      {if (tmp_ndt_7) {
        {
        t6_st = 1;
        transmit6();
        }
      } else {

      }}
    } else {

    }}
    {if (t7_st == 0) {
      int tmp_ndt_8;
      tmp_ndt_8 = __VERIFIER_nondet_int();
      {if (tmp_ndt_8) {
        {
        t7_st = 1;
        transmit7();
        }
      } else {

      }}
    } else {

    }}
    {if (t8_st == 0) {
      int tmp_ndt_9;
      tmp_ndt_9 = __VERIFIER_nondet_int();
      {if (tmp_ndt_9) {
        {
        t8_st = 1;
        transmit8();
        }
      } else {

      }}
    } else {

    }}
    {if (t9_st == 0) {
      int tmp_ndt_10;
      tmp_ndt_10 = __VERIFIER_nondet_int();
      {if (tmp_ndt_10) {
        {
        t9_st = 1;
        transmit9();
        }
      } else {

      }}
    } else {

    }}
    {if (t10_st == 0) {
      int tmp_ndt_11;
      tmp_ndt_11 = __VERIFIER_nondet_int();
      {if (tmp_ndt_11) {
        {
        t10_st = 1;
        transmit10();
        }
      } else {

      }}
    } else {

    }}
    {if (t11_st == 0) {
      int tmp_ndt_12;
      tmp_ndt_12 = __VERIFIER_nondet_int();
      {if (tmp_ndt_12) {
        {
        t11_st = 1;
        transmit11();
        }
      } else {

      }}
    } else {

    }}
  }
  while_13_break: /* CIL Label */ ;
  }

  return;
}
}
void fire_delta_events(void) 
{ 

  {
  {if (M_E == 0) {
    M_E = 1;
  } else {

  }}
  {if (T1_E == 0) {
    T1_E = 1;
  } else {

  }}
  {if (T2_E == 0) {
    T2_E = 1;
  } else {

  }}
  {if (T3_E == 0) {
    T3_E = 1;
  } else {

  }}
  {if (T4_E == 0) {
    T4_E = 1;
  } else {

  }}
  {if (T5_E == 0) {
    T5_E = 1;
  } else {

  }}
  {if (T6_E == 0) {
    T6_E = 1;
  } else {

  }}
  {if (T7_E == 0) {
    T7_E = 1;
  } else {

  }}
  {if (T8_E == 0) {
    T8_E = 1;
  } else {

  }}
  {if (T9_E == 0) {
    T9_E = 1;
  } else {

  }}

int stop_simulation(void) 
{ int tmp ;
  int __retres2 ;

  {
  {
  tmp = exists_runnable_thread();
  }
  {if (tmp) {
    __retres2 = 0;
    goto return_label;
  } else {

  }}
  __retres2 = 1;
  return_label: /* CIL Label */ 
  return (__retres2);
}
}
void start_simulation(void) 
{ int kernel_st ;
  int tmp ;
  int tmp___0 ;

  {
  {
  kernel_st = 0;
  update_channels();
  init_threads();
  fire_delta_events();
  activate_threads();
  reset_delta_events();
  }
  {
  while (1) {
    while_14_continue: /* CIL Label */ ;
    {
    kernel_st = 1;
    eval();
    }
    {
    kernel_st = 2;
    update_channels();
    }
    {
    kernel_st = 3;
    fire_delta_events();
    activate_threads();
    reset_delta_events();
    }
    {
    tmp = exists_runnable_thread();
    }
    {if (tmp == 0) {
      {
      kernel_st = 4;
      fire_time_events();
      activate_threads();
      reset_time_events();
      }
    } else {

    }}
    {
    tmp___0 = stop_simulation();
    }
    {if (tmp___0) {
      goto while_14_break;
    } else {

    }}
  }
  while_14_break: /* CIL Label */ ;
  }

  return;
}
}
int main(void) 
{ int __retres1 ;

  {
  {
  init_model();
  start_simulation();
  }
  __retres1 = 0;
  return (__retres1);
}
}

}
int is_master_triggered(void) 
{ int __retres1 ;

  {
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(515, __func__);
if (m_pc == 1) { __VERIFIER_control_true(515, __func__);

    { __VERIFIER_reached_control(516, __func__);
if (M_E == 1) { __VERIFIER_control_true(516, __func__);

      __retres1 = 1;
      goto return_label;
    } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(519, __func__);


    }}
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(522, __func__);


  }}
  __retres1 = 0;
  return_label: /* CIL Label */ 
  return (__retres1);
}
}
int is_transmit1_triggered(void) 
{ int __retres1 ;

  {
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(534, __func__);
if (t1_pc == 1) { __VERIFIER_control_true(534, __func__);

    { __VERIFIER_reached_control(535, __func__);
if (E_1 == 1) { __VERIFIER_control_true(535, __func__);

      __retres1 = 1;
      goto return_label;
    } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(538, __func__);


    }}
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(541, __func__);


  }}
  __retres1 = 0;
  return_label: /* CIL Label */ 
  return (__retres1);
}
}

{ int __retres1 ;

      __retres1 = 1;
      goto return_label;
    } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(557, __func__);


    }}
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(560, __func__);


  }}
  __retres1 = 0;

  return (__retres1);

{ int __retres1 ;

  {
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(819, __func__);
if (m_st == 0) { __VERIFIER_control_true(819, __func__);

    __retres1 = 1;
    goto return_label;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(822, __func__);

    { __VERIFIER_reached_control(823, __func__);

      __retres1 = 1;
      goto return_label;
    } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(826, __func__);

      { __VERIFIER_reached_control(827, __func__);

        goto return_label;

            goto return_label;

            { __VERIFIER_reached_control(839, __func__);

              __retres1 = 1;
              goto return_label;
            } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(842, __func__);

                goto return_label;

                  goto return_label;

}

      } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1035, __func__);


      }}
    } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1038, __func__);


    }}
    { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1041, __func__);
if (t10_st == 0) { __VERIFIER_control_true(1041, __func__);

      int tmp_ndt_11;
      tmp_ndt_11 = __VERIFIER_nondet_int();
      { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1044, __func__);
if (tmp_ndt_11) { __VERIFIER_control_true(1044, __func__);

        {
        t10_st = 1;
        transmit10();
        }
      } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1049, __func__);


      }}
    } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1052, __func__);


    }}
    { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1055, __func__);
if (t11_st == 0) { __VERIFIER_control_true(1055, __func__);

      int tmp_ndt_12;
      tmp_ndt_12 = __VERIFIER_nondet_int();
      { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1058, __func__);
if (tmp_ndt_12) { __VERIFIER_control_true(1058, __func__);

        {
        t11_st = 1;
        transmit11();
        }
      } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1063, __func__);


      }}
    } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1066, __func__);


    }}
  }
  while_13_break: /* CIL Label */ ;
  }

  return;
}
}

void activate_threads(void) 
{ int tmp ;
  int tmp___0 ;
  int tmp___1 ;
  int tmp___2 ;
  int tmp___3 ;
  int tmp___4 ;
  int tmp___5 ;
  int tmp___6 ;
  int tmp___7 ;
  int tmp___8 ;
  int tmp___9 ;
  int tmp___10 ;

  {
  {
  tmp = is_master_triggered();
  }
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1340, __func__);
if (tmp) { __VERIFIER_control_true(1340, __func__);

    m_st = 0;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1342, __func__);


  }}
  {
  tmp___0 = is_transmit1_triggered();
  }
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1348, __func__);
if (tmp___0) { __VERIFIER_control_true(1348, __func__);

    t1_st = 0;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1350, __func__);


  }}
  {
  tmp___1 = is_transmit2_triggered();
  }
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1356, __func__);
if (tmp___1) { __VERIFIER_control_true(1356, __func__);

    t2_st = 0;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1358, __func__);


  }}
  {
  tmp___2 = is_transmit3_triggered();
  }
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1364, __func__);
if (tmp___2) { __VERIFIER_control_true(1364, __func__);

    t3_st = 0;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1366, __func__);


  }}
  {
  tmp___3 = is_transmit4_triggered();
  }
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1372, __func__);
if (tmp___3) { __VERIFIER_control_true(1372, __func__);

    t4_st = 0;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1374, __func__);


  }}
  {
  tmp___4 = is_transmit5_triggered();
  }
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1380, __func__);
if (tmp___4) { __VERIFIER_control_true(1380, __func__);

    t5_st = 0;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1382, __func__);


  }}
  {
  tmp___5 = is_transmit6_triggered();
  }
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1388, __func__);
if (tmp___5) { __VERIFIER_control_true(1388, __func__);

    t6_st = 0;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1390, __func__);


  }}
  {
  tmp___6 = is_transmit7_triggered();
  }
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1396, __func__);
if (tmp___6) { __VERIFIER_control_true(1396, __func__);

    t7_st = 0;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1398, __func__);


  }}
  {
  tmp___7 = is_transmit8_triggered();
  }
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1404, __func__);
if (tmp___7) { __VERIFIER_control_true(1404, __func__);

    t8_st = 0;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1406, __func__);


  }}
  {

  }
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1412, __func__);

  }}

}
}
void immediate_notify(void) 
{ 

  {
  {
  activate_threads();
  }

  return;
}
}
void fire_time_events(void) 
{ 

  {
  M_E = 1;

  return;
}

}
void init_model(void) 
{ 

  {
  m_i = 1;
  t1_i = 1;
  t2_i = 1;
  t3_i = 1;
  t4_i = 1;
  t5_i = 1;
  t6_i = 1;
  t7_i = 1;
  t8_i = 1;
  t9_i = 1;
  t10_i = 1;
  t11_i = 1;

  return;
}
}
int stop_simulation(void) 
{ int tmp ;
  int __retres2 ;

  {
  {
  tmp = exists_runnable_thread();
  }
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(1608, __func__);
if (tmp) { __VERIFIER_control_true(1608, __func__);

    __retres2 = 0;
    goto return_label;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(1611, __func__);


  }}
  __retres2 = 1;
  return_label: /* CIL Label */ 
  return (__retres2);
}
}
void start_simulation(void) 
{ int kernel_st ;
  int tmp ;

}

  start_simulation();

  return (__retres1);
